articles.title: I feel complete support from owners and fans - Slot
articles.summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot insists he feels "complete support" from the club's hierarchy and fans despite a run of poor on-field performances and growing discontent about his future as manager

articles.title: Egypt goalkeeper banned for striking referee
articles.summary: Al-Ahly goalkeeper Mohamed El-Shenawy banned for four games for striking a referee on the head following an Egyptian Pro League match.

articles.title: It makes English football unique - why the Football League is important too
articles.summary: Tony Pulis explains why the English Football League is so important and why he loved life in the lower divisions, as well as the lessons he learned.

articles.title: FPL talking point: Is it time to use wildcard?
articles.summary: The Premier League returns this weekend and with two double gameweeks on the horizon, the big question: Do you play the wildcard now or hold off until gameweek 33?

articles.title: What's next in captivating Scottish Premiership title race?
articles.summary: Hearts host Motherwell, Celtic welcome St Mirren and Rangers travel to Falkirk in the latest instalment of the fascinating Scottish Premiership title race.

articles.title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This week - McTominay v Law
articles.summary: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

articles.title: The Premier League winner fighting for League Two survival
articles.summary: Christian Fuchs is most famous for winning the Premier League with Leicester City. Now he is battling to keep Newport County in League Two.

articles.title: Littler booed in Brighton - was his exit a 'knock-on' from Van Veen spat?
articles.summary: Luke Littler was booed in Brighton as he recorded his lowest PDC TV average in defeat to Stephen Bunting, and Wayne Mardle believes his Premier League quarter-final exit was a "knock-on" from his spat...

articles.title: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission - but will Tuchel take notice?
articles.summary: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.

articles.title: Rogers centre of transfer tug of war - Friday's gossip
articles.summary: Morgan Rogers likely to be centre of transfer tug of war this summer, Juventus gaining hope of signing Alisson Becker, Liverpool owners believe Arne Slot will still be head coach next season, plus mor...

articles.title: Arsenal's big summer - Arteta contract, £100m for Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly
articles.summary: Whatever happens this season, Arsenal are facing some big decisions in the summer over Mikel Arteta's contract and their transfer moves.

articles.title: Wilson delighted with Fulham's 'amazing' progress
articles.summary: Fulham forward Harry Wilson talks about his impressive individual performances, his relationship with manager Marco Silva, and Fulham's progress.

articles.title: Barcelona complain to Uefa about VAR in Atletico loss
articles.summary: Barcelona submit a complaint to Uefa over a "grave lack of VAR intervention" during their Champions League defeat by Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.

articles.title: How to follow the Premier League on the BBC this weekend
articles.summary: BBC Sport Ask Me Anything explains how to follow the Premier League on the BBC this week.

articles.title: FA investigating non-league chief over alleged abusive email
articles.summary: The FA is investigating after Northern Premier League chairman Mark Harris allegedly sent an abusive email to an FC United of Manchester fan.
